message:
feat: add Windows shell support via shellCommand helper (GAP-4.07)

Extract shell selection into shellCommand() helper that uses cmd.exe /c
on Windows and /bin/bash -c (with /bin/sh fallback) on Unix. Replaces
hardcoded /bin/bash -c in ExecCommand.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
